exceptions.rationale: The read-only UMMS skeleton predates the frozen ONE Work Management ownership boundary.
exceptions.compensatingControl: Provider remains mockData=true, readOnly=true, and dispatch-disabled.
exceptions.removalGate: Canonical WorkOrder provider is supplied by PKG-WORK-MANAGEMENT.

exceptions.rationale: The UCDE local evidence skeleton predates Evidence Center system-of-record ownership.
exceptions.compensatingControl: Provider is local mock data and does not claim production persistence.
exceptions.removalGate: UCDE consumes Evidence Center APIs and no longer provides EvidenceRecord storage.

exceptions.rationale: Reports currently writes a local JSONL audit-readiness store predating Governance & Security AuditRecord ownership.
exceptions.compensatingControl: The store is explicitly local, non-certified, and isolated to report readiness.
exceptions.removalGate: Reports emits AuditRecord through the central audit service.

exceptions.rationale: The legacy monolith persists Device identity and connector configuration together before Asset Graph and EDGE separation.
exceptions.compensatingControl: No new canonical Device ownership may be added to the legacy model.
exceptions.removalGate: Canonical Device and Point records migrate to Asset Graph and runtime configuration moves behind EDGE APIs.
